structure_flags.label: proposal_path
structure_flags.one_line: The orchestrator-specified proposal_path does not exist; the only available .tex proposal read was the archived angle1_rejected file.

novelty_flags.label: proposal
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=field below novelty_target=flagship; the sharp envelope is too close to standard random-set/interval partial-ID algebra unless the GenAI endpoint obstruction is strengthened into the central contribution.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2 / Theorem 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The text calls epsilon-fiber invariance a certificate for the published plug-in endpoint, but Theorem 2 only makes B_epsilon a singleton; equality to Delta_plug also needs mu-dagger endpoint calibration to the fiber constants.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Restore or regenerate the final proposal at the declared proposal_path so downstream stages review the intended artifact rather than an archived rejection copy.
Add an explicit endpoint-calibration condition separating singleton-envelope validity from validity of the fitted plug-in endpoint Delta_plug.
Upgrade Conjecture 2 into a necessary-and-sufficient uniform validity theorem for the named GenAI representation-surface endpoint over an open class of observable laws.
Add a quantitative corollary giving the exact envelope diameter and robust sign-decision threshold in terms of target-fiber oscillations.

recommended_next_step: Patch the missing proposal artifact, then revise the kernel around the GenAI endpoint obstruction rather than the generic random-set envelope.
